name: homeybose
description: Homey Pro bridge for Bose SoundTouch preset buttons and webstreams.

scripts.test: node --check app.js && node --check api.js && node --check drivers/soundtouch/driver.js && node --check drivers/soundtouch/device.js && node --check lib/soundtouch-client.js && node --check lib/radio-browser-client.js && node --check scripts/test-stream-protocol.js
